html:
Exclusive to:
Pearl's Tea are various types of tea that can be made at the Pearl's Tea Shop. Each tea has special effects such as raising or decreasing sanity, healing, cooling or warming up. Pearl's Tea is considered as dish and can be consumed by Warly. It is an item with the Goodie type and thus can also be consumed by Wigfrid.

The amount of ingredients required to make Pearl's Tea decreases as the decoration score increases. When the score is above 50 points, Pearl's Tea requires two fewer dried ingredients. When the score is above 75 points, it requires an additional two fewer dried ingredients.

All teas have 10 uses. Upon drinking the last use, the Empty Bottle is returned to the player.

A brief overview of each tea is provided below:

Tea Effect Recipe
Petal Tea +10 instantly and +45 over 45 seconds ×1 ×8/6/4
Dark Petal Tea -15 instantly and -120 over 60 seconds ×1 ×8/6/4
Forget-Me-Lots Tea +20 instantly and +90 over 45 seconds ×1 ×6/4/2
Tillweed Tea +20 instantly and +30 over 15 seconds ×1 ×6/4/2
Succulent Tea Decreases body temperature by 40 degree for 2 minutes ×1 ×6/4/2
Fire Nettle Tea Increases body temperature by 40 degree for 2 minutes ×1 ×6/4/2
Foliage Tea Reduces negative sanity auras by 90% for 3 minutes ×1 ×8/6/4
Lune Tree Blossom Tea Shadow creatures that attack the player panic for 30 seconds
Pacifies Gestalts for 2-3 minutes		 ×1 ×8/6/4

Contents

  • 1 Petal Tea
  • 2 Dark Petal Tea
  • 3 Foliage Tea
  • 4 Succulent Tea
  • 5 Lune Tree Blossom Tea
  • 6 Fire Nettle Tea
  • 7 Tillweed Tea
  • 8 Forget-Me-Lots Tea
  • 9 Trivia
  • 10 Gallery

Petal Tea

“Soothe your mind with this lovingly brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Petal Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Petals. It has 10 uses. Drinking it restores 10 instantly and an additional 45 Sanity over 45 seconds (1 per second).

Dark Petal Tea

“Sour your mind with this brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Dark Petal Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Dark Petals. It has 10 uses. Drinking it reduces 15 instantly and an additional 120 Sanity over 60 seconds (-2 per second).

Foliage Tea

“Protect your mind against scary foes with this lovingly brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Foliage Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Foliage. It has 10 uses. Drinking it reduces the effect of negative sanity auras to the player by 90% for 3 minutes.

Succulent Tea

“Cool yourself with this lovingly brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Succulent Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Succulent. It has 10 uses. Drinking it decreases the player's temperature by 40 degree for 2 minutes.

Lune Tree Blossom Tea

“Scare off shadows of the night with this lovingly brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Lune Tree Blossom Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Lune Tree Blossom. It has 10 uses. Drinking it causes any shadow creature that attacks the player to panic for 30 seconds and pacifies Gestalts for around 2-3 minutes.

Fire Nettle Tea

“Warm yourself with this lovingly brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Fire Nettle Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Fire Nettle Frond. It has 10 uses. Drinking it increases the player's temperature by 40 degree for 2 minutes

Tillweed Tea

“Tend to your wounds with this lovingly brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Tillweed Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Tillweed. It has 10 uses. Drinking it restores 20 instantly and an additional 30 over 15 seconds (+1 per 0.5 second).

Forget-Me-Lots Tea

“Soothe your mind like nothing else can, with this exception brewed concoction from Pearl.”

-

Forget-Me-Lot Tea is a type of tea made using an Empty Bottle and Dried Forget-Me-Lots. It has 10 uses. Drinking it restores 20 instantly and an additional 90 over 45 seconds (+2 per second).

Trivia

  • The Pearl's Tea was introduced in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.
  • Before the Year of the Clockwork Knight update, Wigfrid couldn’t drink Pearl’s Tea due to it being a Veggie–type item before. Her old quote for all versions of Pearl’s Tea was: “Döst thöu seek tö pöisön me with this vile cöncöctiön?”
Wormwood is capable of healing from Tillweed Tea's over-time effect, but not the first initial health bonus.

Gallery

  • Tea concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Pearl's Tea was introduced in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.
Before the Year of the Clockwork Knight update, Wigfrid couldn’t drink Pearl’s Tea due to it being a Veggie–type item before. Her old quote for all versions of Pearl’s Tea was: “Döst thöu seek tö pöisön me with this vile cöncöctiön?”
Wormwood is capable of healing from Tillweed Tea's over-time effect, but not the first initial health bonus.

title: Pearl's Tea
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} '''Pearl's Tea''' are various types of tea that can be made at the [[Pearl's Tea Shop]]. Each tea has special effects such as raising or decreasing sanity, healing, cooling or warming up. Pearl's Tea is considered as dish and can be consumed by [[Warly]]. It is an item with the [[Goodies|Goodie]] type and thus can also be consumed by [[Wigfrid]]. The amount of ingredients required to make Pearl's Tea decreases as the [[Crabby_Hermit#Decoration|decoration score]] increases. When the score is above 50 points, Pearl's Tea requires two fewer dried ingredients. When the score is above 75 points, it requires an additional two fewer dried ingredients. All teas have 10 uses. Drinking it restores 20 {{Sanity}} instantly and an additional 90 {{Sanity}} over 45 seconds (+2 per second). {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia == * The Pearl's Tea was introduced in the ''[[Winter's Feast 2025]]'' update. * Before the ''[[Year of the Clockwork Knight]]'' update, Wigfrid couldn’t drink Pearl’s Tea due to it being a [[Veggie]]–type item before. Her old quote for all versions of Pearl’s Tea was: “''Döst thöu seek tö pöisön me with this vile cöncöctiön?''” [[Wormwood]] is capable of healing from Tillweed Tea's over-time effect, but not the first initial health bonus. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== RWP WF25 Tea Concept Art.png|Tea concept art from ''Rhymes with Play'' stream. {{clear}} {{Crock Pot Food}}
